sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling cold easily and experiencing chills. He also reports experiencing headaches and occasional wheezing. The patient reports no tenderness. The patient reports feeling fatigued.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 90/60 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm. Temperature is 99.2°F. Lung auscultation reveals mild wheezing bilaterally.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with anemia and possible infection. A referral to a hematologist has been sent.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor wants the patient to start taking iron pills. The doctor wants the patient to take iron pills with orange juice. The doctor plans to use a pill camera. The doctor orders an upper endoscopy. The doctor orders a colonoscopy. Blood work will be repeated.
